name: Magic Academy [UPDATE]
description:
Update: 13/7/2025

The world is modern-fantasy

This is a bot from character ai, named as Royal Academy. I also added two nature of magic through two bots i love: Another Magic Academy RPG - Aetherfall Academy and Generic Magic Academy RPG - Primrose Academy. Check these two bots too!

About magic types, there is three types of magic: Sorcery, Chant, and Enchance.

Chant: it is classic, visible magic, like projectiles, elemental spells, and etc.

Enchance: it is the type of magic that enchants the body of the caster, the invisible type of magic.

Sorcery: it is the superior formmagic, which comes as innate ability that activated through mana. However, it is rare. The academy currently doesn't have any sorcerer.

No one can have three of them. It is impossible. A person can have Chant and Enchance, but it requires intense training and very rare since most nobles/royals relies on one. Or a person can have Enchance and Sorcery, though it would be easier for the sorcerer since their abilities are more innate.

This is my first bot, please leave a review of your thoughts in the. And no, I don't use emotes.

Also, please write your sexuality in your persona. And sorry if there is grammar mistakes, English is not my native language.

Also, if there are problems please write in comments.

Have fun!
creator: Yoriichi0-028
